message:
test(dashboard): add 31 integration tests for dashboard CLI and state-file contract (bd-xzt.4.2)

Covers CLI argument semantics (help, JSON rejection, flag conflicts), DaemonState
serialization roundtrips (fresh/stale/missing/corrupt/partial/forward-compatible),
adapter staleness threshold, legacy constraints, default values, schema evolution,
unicode paths, large counters, and atomic write patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
